jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at AIIMS
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS:
AIIMS is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
